/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc  -D_LARGEFILE64_SOURCE -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.6 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/cmTC_31cfa.dir/CheckIncludeFile.c.o -o cmTC_31cfa
